title: Data loader integration examples for React components
purpose: Demonstrates various ways to integrate data loading functionality into React components with hooks for loading state management, progress tracking, and error handling.
module_context: Exports multiple React hooks and utility functions for loading session artifacts with progress tracking and error recovery.

methods.name: useLoadSessionArtifacts
methods.normalized_params: (project: string | null, session: string | null): { isLoading: boolean; error: string | null; totalArtifacts: number; loadedCount: number }

steps.content: Initialize loading state and error tracking.
Start artifact loading when project and session are provided.
Set loading state to true and clear previous errors before starting load.
Attempt to load all artifacts for the given project and session.
IF loading fails, capture and store the error message.
Clean up progress listeners when component unmounts.
Update total artifact count upon successful load completion.
Set loading state to false after load attempt completes.

methods.name: useLoadingProgress
methods.normalized_params: (): { progress: LoadingProgress | null; loaded: number; total: number }

steps.content: Initialize progress tracking state variables.
Subscribe to loading progress events on component mount.
Update progress state based on received progress events.
Reset loaded and total counts when a new loading session starts.
Accumulate loaded and total counts for artifact loaded events.
Set final loaded and total counts when loading completes.
Clean up progress listener when component unmounts.
Subscribe to loading progress events on component mount.
Set global loading state to true when loading starts.
Set global loading state to false when loading completes or fails.
Clean up progress listener when component unmounts.
Initialize loading state and count tracking for specific artifact type.
Subscribe to loading progress events on component mount.
Update loading state and count when progress events match the specified artifact type.
Set loading state to true and reset count when a new loading session starts.
Set loading state to false when artifact type loading completes or fails.
Clean up progress listener when component unmounts.

methods.name: handleSessionChange
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<{ totalArtifacts: number; diagrams: any[]; documents: any[]; designs: any[]; spreadsheets: any[]; snippets: any[] }>

steps.content: Attempt to load all artifacts for the given project and session.
Log the total number of loaded artifacts upon successful load.
Warn if no diagrams were found in the session.
Warn if no documents were found in the session.
IF loading fails, log the error and re-throw it.
Subscribe to loading progress events.
Log start of artifact loading.
Log number of loaded artifacts and their type.
Log completion of all artifact loading.
Log any loading errors that occur.
Return cleanup function to unsubscribe from progress events.
Attempt to load only diagrams for the given project and session.
Log the loaded diagrams upon successful load.
IF loading fails, log the error and return an empty array.
Attempt to load only documents for the given project and session.
Log the loaded documents upon successful load.
IF loading fails, log the error and return an empty array.
